programme.title: Key Witness - EP 13
programme.desc: Dex and Da Peng bring Dan Nong to the freezer warehouse, where they interrogate him to reveal the mastermind behind the village massacre. Dan Nong refuses to speak. Upon seeing there's no way out, Da Peng kills Dan Nong.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 14
programme.desc: The Hong Kong police want Nick, who used to be an undercover agent, to testify in court for a gang vendetta case. However, the gang kidnaps him, ties him up and dumps him into the sea. As Nick was on the brink of death, Guo Ying and her two partners arrive in time, and Zhi Ming plunges into the waters to rescue him.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 19
programme.desc: Blossom pretends that she is pregnant and asks Jia Hong for money, forcing Jia Hong to rob. Shu Juan and Xiao Long want Jia Hong to bring Blossom to meet them. Shu Juan exposes that Blossom is not pregnant, and that she wants to cheat Jia Hong's money. Blossom's motives are exposed, and in a fit of anger, she breaks up with Jia Hong. Jia Hong is heartbroken, and he takes his anger out on Shu Juan, as he is unhappy that she has broken them up.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 20
programme.desc: Xi Yue sleeps with Yu Jie after getting drunk. Feeling regretful, she quickly goes back home. Yan Xun apologises to Xi Yue that he is unable to celebrate their wedding anniversary. He gives her a gift, and informs her that he will be going overseas to work. Xi Yue becomes emotional. Yan Xun finds out that Xi Yue has an affair, and is taken aback by the news. Xi Yue is unable to face Yan Xun, so she leaves the house. Yan Xun confronts Yu Jie aggressively, and demands Yu Jie to leave the house.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 13
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

He realises that paper offerings that are brought to life return to ashes after 100 days and is anxious that Cheng doesn’t have much time left. Liang Yan appears in Liang’s dream and tells him that Cheng can be saved if someone takes his place.

programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100 pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness -benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 222
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 299
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 314
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use-helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 281
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration-leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 313
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants-Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect-with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 204
programme.desc: All new blender solution, which integrates the functions of juicer, soymilk and cooking!

programme.title: We Never Stop - EP 8
programme.desc: The program brings together 100 Chinese physical fitness experts to compete in an undifferentiated physical fitness competition, and ultimately determines a champion to become the "strongest body" of the year.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 5
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 23
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Wei Lun and his team went to the hospital to arrest Pu Da Ren, but he pretends to collapse from a heart attack. Pan Shun surrenders at the police station and claims that he is the real culprit to all the crimes, not Pu Da Ren.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 15
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Shixun is unaware that Meilan is secretly monitoring him. Convinced that he can never forget Zhi-en, Meilan installs a surveillance camera in his home.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 16
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en is assigned as Meilan's helper. Meilan deliberately humiliates and belittles her, especially in front of Shixun.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 6
programme.desc: In this episode, the team take on Kaohsiung’s most beautiful ridgeline - the Qiling Ridge Trail, a popular training ground for mountaineers preparing for Taiwan’s Hundred Peaks. Along the way, hikers are rewarded with sweeping views of Qishan and Meinong’s farmlands, and on clear days, they can even see the Dawu Mountains to the south and the Alishan Range to the north.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 20
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Magu and the Grim Reaper reveal that the firefly is Qingming, who turned back when Magu was escorting him to the afterlife.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 28
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 6

programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 9
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

She secretly takes revenge by making the three men fall in love with her and then ignoring their love.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 167
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 621
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 115
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 167
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 621
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 116
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SURAT KALENG UNTUK MANTAN
programme.desc: Dito (Ridho Ilahi) and Dewi (Masayu Clara) fall in love, but their parents are at war: Dewi sells mung bean porridge while Dito sells chicken porridge. Their families want to marry them off to wealthy suitors, but the couple chooses to fight for their love, documenting their dreams and romance in letters hidden inside a tin can.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 168
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Ayam Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Nyaman
programme.desc: After his acting contract is terminated due to a scandal with a co-star, Fadi (Indra Evans) retreats to his mother’s village for a break. There, he meets Naura (Rachquel Nesia), a legendary 'poultry queen' who runs the most successful chicken and egg business in town.

programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) is forced into an unusual disguise: he must pose as a Korean Idol to save a 'Meet and Greet' event organized by Erika. Reluctantly, Keni steps into the spotlight, leading to a series of comedic and high-pressure situations.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 168

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 169
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gak Pengen Jadi Ipar Pengennya Jadi Pacar
programme.desc: Wini (Indah Nicole) accidentally crashes her bike into Dito (Hardi Fadhillah), causing an 'injury' to his sensitive area. Feeling responsible for his future, Wini tries to match her sister with Dito. However, she soon realizes her own heart objects, she is secretly falling for the man she’s trying to marry off.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 623
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Lawak Ke Der Tak Coverline - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Gelak Gempak - EP 6
programme.desc: Perjalanan pencarian pelawak "stand up" terunggul di Malaysia bermula bersama Dato’ Afdlin Shauki, Harith Iskander, Nabil and Douglas Lim di kelab-kelab komedi tempatan.

programme.title: Ini Malam Kita Punya - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara yang akan di hoskan oleh Nabil Ahmad yang akan mengetengahkan sketch lawak dan temu bual bersama artis-artis terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 8
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: MLM Terbaik 2016 - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 20
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 6
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 16
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 30
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 14
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 6

programme.title: Ting Tong… Love
programme.desc: Bosan dengan desakan ibunya untuk berkahwin, Hairi akhirnya bersetuju dengan syarat dia boleh memilih jodohnya sendiri. Adakah calon pilihan Hairi menepati citarasa ibunya?

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 4

programme.title: Sketso - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 17

programme.title: Geng Gajet - EP 4

programme.title: Meja Bulat Sepahtu - EP 4

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 6

programme.desc: Arun is an Indian undercover agent enlisted to stop ISI chief Ishaq Khan. The village girl Reshma helps him but endangers her own life. Release Year: 2003 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards- Hall of Fame, Best Special Effects-Redchillies.VFX . Awards of the International Indian Film Academy- Best Action, Best Special Effects,

programme.desc: An accident brings Karan and Pooja close to each other. When Karan finally decides to propose to her, he realises that destiny has other plans for them. Release Year: 2001 Director: Satish Kaushik Awards: Zee Cine Awards: Best Debut Male: TuSShar Kapoor.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 32
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres A Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Le Chant Du Fleuve
programme.desc: Poetic and patrimonial walk along the Loire. This dreamlike escapade, depicted as a love story between the river and the literature it has inspired, highlights the changing beauty of the Loire shores to the rhythm of the seasons.

programme.title: La Bouteille
programme.desc: A jogger speeds across fields burnt by the sun. He throws his finished bottle of water into nature. The bottle immediately comes back to him, interrupting his run.
November 2030. It's 48°C in the classroom. Impossible to do any teaching.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 5
programme.desc: Leon meets Maggie, who is non-sighted and with whom he has a lot in common. While Ricardo makes a big decision about his relationship, Belinda makes a big mistake in following Amanda's advice.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 6
programme.desc: Leon et Maggie become closer, which arouses Florence's curiosity, as she would love to meet Leon's new friend. Between what's happening with her cousin, Belinda's contract and Francis' trip, Julietta is feeling completely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 7
programme.desc: Florence has met Maggie and her interest in the young woman is jeopardising her relationship with Leon. Ricardo puts work first, to the detriment of his classes and gets into trouble. Julietta and Ricardo are concerned about him, but their discussion soon turns into an argument.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 26
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Bien Bati - EP 5
programme.desc: The new owner of an old private hospital is proud of belonging to a line of matriarchs who have run this place. Isabelle Paradis's bicentenary house allows her to transform her knowledge into reality. And we discover a stonecutter's work.

programme.title: A Travers Champs - EP 4
programme.desc: While farming has been seen positively by the majority of the population for a long time, changes in attitudes, especially relating to animal well-being, have altered how people view farming methods.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 26
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 4
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 4

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Paris La Blanche
programme.desc: Nour has been in Paris for nearly fifty years. At 70, his wife Rekia leaves Algeria for the first time to persuade him to return home to his village there. But after such a long time, the man that she eventually finds has become a stranger.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 25
programme.desc: One morning, two men hold up a butcher's lorry and steal its load of meat. Alex quickly finds the thieves: recently arrived in the region they are ready to do whatever it takes to help those in greatest need. Their plan is to strike increasing-ly harder.

programme.title: Movie - Ponniyin Selvan 1
programme.desc: Sensing an uprising in the capital, Crown Prince Aditha Karikalan sends his friend Vallavaraiyan Vandiyadevan on a mission that sets off a series of conspiracies against the reigning king.

programme.title: Movie - Udhayam NH4
programme.desc: Prabhu, a young college student, kidnaps his lover Rithika when her father disapproves of their relationship. Manoj Menon, an encounter specialist, is appointed to track them down.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhalagi
programme.desc: Nandhini and Thyagu, two childhood friends from different castes, fall in love with each other. However, when Raja discovers their relationship and kills her, her friends set out to seek justice.

programme.title: Movie - Mythili
programme.desc: Deepu dreams of becoming famous by making a musical album, and strange things begin to happen when they film a music video in a haunted house.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sundara Purushan
programme.desc: A young man returns home years after he ran away. He tries to win over his childhood love, but she is in love with someone else. His brother implicates the girl's lover in a murder and sends him to jail.

programme.title: Movie - Inga Enna Solludhu
programme.desc: A man is forced into an unwanted marriage in order to become rich quickly with his wife's money. However, his foolishness and misfortune push his wife to attempt suicide.

programme.title: Movie - Thadaiyara Thaaka
programme.desc: A young man dreams of making a fortune in Chennai; he owns a travel agency and is all set to marry his lover. After he crosses paths with a loan shark, the latter is killed mysteriously. The young man runs for cover and plans to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie - Kungumapottu Gounder
programme.desc: Kandasamy is desperate to enroll his son in a good school. Problems arise when his wife spots him with an educated woman who is posing as their child's mother in order to help the kid get admission.

programme.title: Movie - Engal Anna
programme.desc: Prabhakar and Bhavani are deeply in love with each other. However, lovers turn enemies when Prabhakar's father is falsely accused of killing Bhavani's father.

programme.title: Movie - Thai Mel Aanai (New)
programme.desc: Raja, a young man, is determined to avenge the death of his mother and sister. But his friend, a law-abiding police officer, does not want Raja to take the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie - Padhavi
programme.desc: Loknath is affectionate to his step-son and step-daughter as he is to his son. But rivalry stews between the step-brothers, and Loknath is unable to resolve the issue.

programme.title: Movie - Rock N Roll
programme.desc: Chandramouli, an international drummer, goes to Chennai to help his friend in his new project. However, his life turns upside down when he falls in love with a playback singer.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Vathiyar
programme.desc: A scientist gets into trouble when he develops a formula that enables the soul to move out of a body and enter the person or animal present in close proximity.

programme.title: Movie - Mappilai Thevai
programme.desc: A woman is reluctant to get married and settle down. However, everything changes when her mother introduces her to someone.

programme.title: Movie - Vetaiyadu Viliayadu
programme.desc: DCP Raghavan sets off on the trail of the killers of Rani, the daughter of a police officer. Following this, many more murders take place, leading him to New York to capture the maniac killers.

programme.title: Movie - Mercury Pookal
programme.desc: A boy and girl get married due to the pressure from their respective families. Eventually, they fall in love with each other, but a new challenge awaits their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Elumalai
programme.desc: A village head prepares for their clan's safety from the neighbouring village thugs. He decides to train one boy from each family and chooses his fourth son for the job. Years later, he runs a classical dance school in the village.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Day 3 Session 2 Tie 3: Denmark vs Sweden (C1) (Live)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 1 H/Ls
programme.desc: Catch all the exhilarating moments from Stage 1 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists begin at the Ministry of Tourism and finish at the Bimmah Sink Hole.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Charleston Open (500) Final
programme.desc: The Credit One Charleston Open is the largest women’s-only professional tennis tournament in North America, held annually on Daniel Island in Charleston, SC. As a top-tier WTA 500 event played on green clay, it serves as the premier clay-court kickoff for the tour. Founded in 1973, it is a historic, 9 day event attracting top-20 players.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Day 5 Session 1
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 37
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 9
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 30
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems. We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 3
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career - from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex's Ferguson's Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 36
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW34 Arsenal v Newcastle United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW34) - EP 338
programme.desc: Tottenham have lost their last three away league games against Wolves, as many as they had in their previous 16 visits to Molineux (W10 D3).

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26 - EP 9
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Newcastle United (MW34) - EP 339
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.desc: Manchester United have lost their last two league games against Brentford, more than they had in their previous 11 (W8 D2 L1).

programme.desc: Tottenham have lost their last three away league games against Wolves, as many as they had in their previous 16 visits to Molineux (W10 D3).

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: WCCB David Benavidez vs. David Morrell
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, interim WBC Light Heavyweight Champion David Benavidez meets WBA 'Regular' champion David Morrell.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Yves Edwards vs. Mike Thomas Brown
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features Mike Thomas Brown vs. Yves "Thugjitsu Master" Edwards. These two will clash in a heated battle as part of BodogFIGHT's Clash of the Nations in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Gabriel Martinez vs. Serhiy Dzinziruk
programme.desc: This episode features a bout for the vacant WBC diamond middleweight title, as Sergio Gabriel 'Maravilla' Martinez (46-2, 25 KOs) takes on fellow southpaw Serhiy Dzinziruk, aka 'Dzyna Razor' (37-0. 24 KOs). This fight took place from Foxwoods Resort Casino in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA, on March 12, 2011. Martinez was the reigning Fighter of the Year coming into the fight and vacated his WBC Middleweight title in order to fight the undefeated former champion Dzinziruk.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of knockout artists as Victor Ortiz, entering with eight straight knockout wins, faces Marcos Maidana, who has knockouts in 24 of his 25 victories. The winner of this bout will be crowned the interim WBA light welterweight champion.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 10
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 94
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing about silly things that make them smile.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 38
programme.desc: Plom's favourite toy is broken, so Doctor Mae-Mae promises to fix it. But when Doctor Mae-Mae realises she's taken on too many patients, she doesn't know if she'll be able to fix Plom's toy after all.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: Dog and Pug escape a very noisy Bookshop to find Granny Pug who is leading a mediation retreat. They are trying to find a peaceful spot.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: There's some funny 'buzzy-ness' going on in OKIDO. Where are all the bees? Messy and friends meet bee royalty and save the day!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: JoJo has a sleepover at Gran Gran's but is confused when bedtime comes while it's still light outside! Gran Gran creates their own starry sky for JoJo.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 7
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: As Mum goes for a walk along the beach, Bluey runs to catch up with her. Along the way, she has a series of encounters that both excite and test her in her first solo adventure.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels need to rescue Enid when they see her at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch discovers his Halloween pumpkin isn't as big as the Grimbots' one, he goes in search of some fertilizer to help it grow.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Annabel is making a dessert called Kaiserschmarren served with blueberries and raspberries. Annabel wears a traditional dress and invites her friends to her Austrian chalet.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7) - EP 9
programme.desc: Seaweed is excited because today is THE BIG DAY, but he's forgotten what THE BIG DAY actually is. Can Captain Captain and Sandy help him remember?

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Krash finds a football somewhere and then he plays with it with He-He and Raccoon.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: It's Evil Pea's birthday, but she and Carrot are trapped in the bottom of her freezer. They must put their differences aside and work together to escape.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 91
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa‐Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of chickens - a brown chicken, a white chicken, a clucking chicken and some friendly chickens.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 47
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 50
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Globetrotting Andy, Jen and Scout are on a new mission in their Eco-Explorer: to discover more about incredible animal families and their babies.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 18
programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: Sarah suggests visiting the spare sounds section of the Big Shop when Duck loses his quack.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: Umbrella is nervous about meeting up with his pen pal at the Parasol Show, so Sarah & Duck accompany him.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 35
programme.desc: Stanley helps Seamus and Little Woo reconstruct the Big Wheel from Seamus' childhood. This is more difficult than Stanley thought it would be as it needs a clean and an upgrade.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 34
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Wobbly teeth, hiccups, hay fever, and sneezy problems, the talking animals discuss all the things that make them unwell.

programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.desc: It's Chicory singing about how she was discovered in the song "Chicory, Dickory, Dock!"
